study_title: Digital Coaching to Improve CPAP Use in Obstructive Sleep Apnea (CPAP-COACH)
design_summary: 12-week, single-arm study of app-based coaching to improve CPAP adherence in adults with obstructive sleep apnea who currently use their CPAP less than recommended. Participants sync CPAP usage data weekly through the study app.

criteria.probe: To begin, how old are you?

criteria.text: Diagnosed with obstructive sleep apnea by a sleep study performed within the past 24 months.
criteria.probe: When was the sleep study that diagnosed your sleep apnea done?
criteria.unknown_rule: If the participant cannot say, even roughly, whether the diagnosing sleep study was within the past 24 months, INC2 is unknown.

criteria.text: Prescribed CPAP at least 1 month ago and currently averaging UNDER 4 hours of CPAP use per night (this study is specifically for people struggling with CPAP use; consistent users of 4+ hours per night do not qualify).
criteria.probe: About how many hours per night are you currently using your CPAP machine?
criteria.unknown_rule: If the participant cannot estimate their average nightly CPAP hours, INC3 is unknown.

criteria.text: Owns a smartphone and is willing to sync CPAP usage data through the study app weekly.
criteria.probe: Do you own a smartphone, and would you be willing to sync your CPAP usage data through our app each week?

criteria.text: Willing to participate for the full 12 weeks.
criteria.probe: The program runs a full 12 weeks - is that a commitment you can make?

criteria.text: Diagnosed central sleep apnea or treatment-emergent central sleep apnea.
criteria.probe: Have you ever been told you have central sleep apnea, as opposed to obstructive?

criteria.text: Currently uses supplemental oxygen at home.
criteria.probe: Do you use supplemental oxygen at home?

criteria.text: Works overnight shifts or rotating shifts that include nights.
criteria.probe: Do you work overnight or rotating shifts?

criteria.text: Hospitalized for heart failure within the past 3 months.
criteria.probe: Have you been hospitalized for heart failure in the past three months?

criteria.text: Currently enrolled in another interventional clinical trial or structured sleep program.
criteria.probe: Are you currently enrolled in another clinical trial or a structured sleep program?
